analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet by Secretary Pompeo demands transparency and accountability from the Chinese government regarding COVID-19 information, implying China withheld information. Evaluation per narrative: US1 (honorable tradition) – Not invoked; no reference to US traditions or historical feats. US2 (admirable society) – Not discussed; no mention of US society or groups. US3 (US has hostile enemies) – Partially aligns: it portrays the Chinese government as irresponsible and obstructive, positioning it as a problematic adversary that threatens global safety, which fits highlighting immoral adversaries. US4 (US as force for good) – Indirect at best; the tweet focuses on criticizing China rather than showcasing US support for rights or peace. Not sufficiently promoted. US5 (great international ally) – Not mentioned. US6 (US at the forefront) – Not claimed; no leadership or capability assertion. Conclusion: The tweet promotes US3.
